title: Parallax Sounds
description: Parallax Sounds is a pack that aims to change EVERY sound in Minecraft with something more realistic. Zombies are more terrifying, portals are creepy and mysterious, weather is beautiful and destructive, animals sound like animals.
body:
Parallax Sounds is a pack that aims to change EVERY sound in Minecraft with something more realistic. Zombies are more terrifying, portals are creepy and mysterious, weather is beautiful and destructive, animals sound like animals. This works with addons, texture packs, shaders, and even on servers. It changes 550+ sounds and I will be adding more! All sounds are high quality with digitally enchanted surround sounds, and it works great with Dolby Atmos!

This is my pack I made years ago & have been supporting for Bedrock Edition, ported over for Java users. If you want to hear some of the sounds in a video I will provide a link but be warned the video is old and new/more sounds have been added and some sounds I didn't like have been replaced/improved. Enjoy: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=99NNmyZp74w
